name: Maria Devitt
summary:
Clinical Study Lead with 5+ years of experience in regulated pharmaceutical environments, skilled in cross-functional
team coordination, timeline management, risk management, and process improvement with expertise in developing and
QCing clinical data (ADaM datasets and TFLs in compliance with CDISC standards and study protocols).

experience.title: Lead cross-functional meetings (Data Management, Stats, Medical Writing, Safety, Regulatory) to discuss risks and
experience.company: Study Lead Statistical Programmer Remote, USA New Jersey
bullets: Lead cross-functional meetings (Data Management, Stats, Medical Writing, Safety, Regulatory) to discuss risks and
align deliverables for insurance claims, registry, and post-market trial data integration.
Maintained and optimized integrated timelines across programs using Jira and internal planning tools, balancing
team capacity, priorities, and dependencies to ensure on-time delivery.
Drive day-to-day execution of strategic initiatives, translating high-level objectives into actionable plans and measurable
results across cross-functional teams.
Proactively identified and mitigated program risks, navigating ambiguity to maintain momentum and adapt plans as
requirements evolved.
Contribute to internal programming forums, capability initiatives, and process improvements, supporting the resolution
of complex programming and data issues.
Produce accurate, reproducible SAS code by authoring OPS and reviewing key study documents (e.g., SAP,
randomization strategy) to support both clinical and real-world data analysis.
QC SAS programming code and review all Dry Run deliverables and PASR reports to ensure compliance with
stakeholders needs.

experience.title: Led a structured 5S operational excellence initiative within a manufacturing environment, improving workflow
bullets: Led a structured 5S operational excellence initiative within a manufacturing environment, improving workflow
efficiency, standardization, and cross-functional engagement.
Engaged with cross functional teams, using operational knowledge and project management skills prioritizing
improvements that simplify both technical and business systems.
Authored, revised, and managed manufacturing documents such as SOPs and Batch Records, keeping a strong attention
to detail.
Initiated and conducted deviation investigations leading to the creation of CAPAs by leading data gathering, and
presentation in a timely manner for the business needs.
Supported operational decision-making by balancing technical requirements, business needs, and resource
considerations.

experience.title: Trained less experienced team members while emphasizing safety and compliance throughout the process.
experience.company: Biopharm Manufacturing Associate II and I Conshohocken, PA
bullets: Trained less experienced team members while emphasizing safety and compliance throughout the process.
Efficiently performed production operations by following written SOP s and understanding the safety and quality
aspects of the procedures.
Aided in cross-functional activities, creating and executing engineering and validation protocols.

education: Coursework: Intro to Statistical Computing (SAS), Biostatistics (R), Survival Data Analysis (SAS), Data Science
